title: stelis lapazensis
intro: Stelis lapazensis, also known as the Orchid of the Andes, is a species of orchid native to the tropical Andes region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood sugar levels and exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Stelis lapazensis include its potential to improve insulin sensitivity and reduce the risk of complications associated with diabetes, as well as its possible anti-cancer and antimicrobial effects. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which are often prepared by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water to harness its medicinal properties.
